utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item includes both a description and a cost, which satisfies the requirement of specifying coverage with costs. The total_budget provides a consolidated monthly cost. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact item names in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Package for health (maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan in both physical and mental health), HomeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents (maps to HomeFirst Standard Coverage under home_content), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (exact match under travel_insurance), and an additional services enrollment not present in ratings (so we exclude it). We then assign the exact ratings from the ground truth for these items.
